title: Uncraftable Crafting
body:
This mod adds some crafting recipes which were previously uncraftable.


Crafting recipes:

- Smithing Template 
- Nametag
- Enchanted Golden Apple
- Full Chainmail Armor
- Experience Bottle
- Elytra
- Rabbit Foot
Vines
Totem Of Undying
Obsidian


^ Recipes at gallery.
